title: Close P10 production stability
objective:
Run script:
"""
done = Path('governance/tasks/done/P10_PRODUCTION_STABILITY.md')
done.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
done.write_text('# P10 Production Stability — DONE\n\nBEM-526 completed.\n\nEvidence:\n- Baseline audit: b60a98d0a65db9a80f45763388b5e482d204e57e\n- Recovery runbook: 5d7dcf68aa8bd40ffdac75e228cda8104ef92846\n- Runbook file: governance/protocols/PRODUCTION_STABILITY_RUNBOOK.md\n- Report files: governance/reports/bem526_p10_baseline_audit.md, governance/reports/bem526_p10_recovery_rules.md\n\nPolicy:\n- Executor: free ubuntu-latest Python v3\n- No paid OpenAI API\n- No Codex CLI\n- No issue comments\n- No schedule triggers\n\nBlocker: null\n')

report = Path('governance/reports/bem526_p10_pass_report.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
report.write_text('# BEM-526 | P10 Production Stability | PASS\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 11:56 (UTC+3)\n\n## Выполнено\n- Проведён baseline audit production-контура.\n- Создан production stability runbook.\n- Зафиксирован recovery contract для queued/completed/failed/result-missing.\n- Подтверждён executor v3 Run script без paid OpenAI API.\n- Roadmap переведён на P11 Monitoring + Alerts.\n\n## Доказательства\n- b60a98d0a65db9a80f45763388b5e482d204e57e\n- 5d7dcf68aa8bd40ffdac75e228cda8104ef92846\n- governance/tasks/done/P10_PRODUCTION_STABILITY.md\n- governance/protocols/PRODUCTION_STABILITY_RUNBOOK.md\n\n## Blocker\nnull\n')

state_path = Path('governance/state/roadmap_state.json')
data = json.loads(state_path.read_text())
data['updated_at'] = now
data['cursor'] = 'BEM-526_P10_PRODUCTION_STABILITY_CLOSED'
data['current_phase'] = 'P11'
data['phase_title'] = 'Monitoring + Alerts'
data['blocker'] = None
pc = data.get('phases_completed', [])
if 'P10' not in pc:
    pc.append('P10')
data['phases_completed'] = pc
remaining = [x for x in data.get('phases_remaining', []) if x != 'P10']
if 'P11' not in remaining and 'P11' not in pc:
    remaining.insert(0, 'P11')
clean = []
for x in remaining:
    if x not in clean and x not in pc:
        clean.append(x)
data['phases_remaining'] = clean

tasks = data.get('tasks', [])
found_p10 = False
found_p11 = False
for task in tasks:
    if task.get('task_id') in ['P10_PRODUCTION_STABILITY', 'P10']:
        task['task_id'] = 'P10_PRODUCTION_STABILITY'
        task['status'] = 'completed'
        task['completed_at'] = now
        task['evidence'] = ['b60a98d0a65db9a80f45763388b5e482d204e57e', '5d7dcf68aa8bd40ffdac75e228cda8104ef92846']
        found_p10 = True
    if task.get('task_id') in ['P11_MONITORING_ALERTS', 'P11']:
        task['task_id'] = 'P11_MONITORING_ALERTS'
        task['status'] = 'pending'
        found_p11 = True
if not found_p10:
    tasks.append({'task_id':'P10_PRODUCTION_STABILITY','status':'completed','completed_at':now,'evidence':['b60a98d0a65db9a80f45763388b5e482d204e57e','5d7dcf68aa8bd40ffdac75e228cda8104ef92846']})
if not found_p11:
    tasks.append({'task_id':'P11_MONITORING_ALERTS','status':'pending','note':'Next phase after P10 closure'})
data['tasks'] = tasks
state_path.write_text(json.dumps(data, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n')

changed_files.extend([str(done), str(report), str(state_path)])
ops_applied.append('closed P10 and advanced roadmap to P11')
"""
No issue comments.
